title: Legend Mod [Accurate Recreation]
description: This is an accurate recreation of the infamous German Youtuber-Series "Minecraft Legend"
body: This is an almost identical recreation of the infamous German-Project "Minecraft Legend", it includes Potion-Tipped Swords and Bows aswell as two new Armors- and Sword materials. One of them is the Nether Armor, when fully worn it protects you from any Fire Damage and it's protection is the same as the Iron Armor. The next one is the Legend Armor, its basically the same just more expensive and being as good as Diamond Armor.
